video_info.title: Roland-Garros 2026
video_info.shortDescription: The world's premier clay-court championship returns to Paris, gathering the global elite to battle on the iconic red dirt where victory belongs to the most tenacious. As players push their endurance and tactical artistry to the absolute limit, they compete for ultimate glory and a historic place in Grand Slam history. Tune in to catch all the action from Roland-Garros 2026, LIVE & exclusively on Sony LIV.

video_info.title: UEFA International Friendlies
video_info.shortDescription: Norway and Sweden renew their fierce Nordic rivalry in a high-stakes Play-Off final with a place at the World Cup on the line. Norway will seek to capitalize on their attacking firepower and momentum, while Sweden rely on experience, structure, and composure under pressure. With regional pride and qualification hanging in the balance, this clash promises intensity, drama, and a battle that could be decided by the finest of margins. Catch all the action from the International Friendlies, LIVE on Sony LIV.
